channel.title: hiking on Sudeep's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in hiking on Sudeep's Blog

item.title: Hiking to Pumdikot View Tower
item.description: Today [23 March 2017 12:00-18:00], Me and my friend Srawan K.C with this dog went to hiking to Pumdikot View Tower. I will cover about our hiking in this post. Our route: Jarebar -> Damside -> World Peace Pagoda(Shanti Stupa) -> Pumdikot View Tower Yesterday night i sent a message to Srawan to go for a hiking. He then replied me today at 11AM with a plan to hike to Pumdikot.
